evals.prompt: 给我的 AI 视频生成产品做一个高转化官网首页，要有高级感、滚动动效、真实卖点文案和示意视觉。
evals.expected_output: Skill should route to premium frontend delivery, explicitly state design dials, plan motion with reduced-motion support, and treat the work as a premium browser-facing build rather than a plain component or backend task.
expectations: The output frames the task as a premium browser-facing frontend build.
The output explicitly states design dials such as DESIGN_VARIANCE, MOTION_INTENSITY, and VISUAL_DENSITY or clearly equivalent dial choices.
The output includes section / motion / asset / copy planning.
The output explicitly mentions reduced-motion or prefers-reduced-motion handling.
The output avoids reducing the task to backend work or generic React component scaffolding.

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个 SaaS 仪表盘首页，要求响应式、状态齐全、视觉层级清晰，但不要太花。
evals.expected_output: Skill should stay in frontend-dev, emphasize responsive UI, layout hierarchy, state coverage, and practical polish, while making restrained motion / visual dial choices instead of defaulting to cinematic overdesign or backend expansion.
expectations: The output keeps the focus on browser experience and product UI.
The plan includes loading / empty / error states.
The output reflects restrained visual or motion choices rather than flashy marketing-site treatment.
The output avoids expanding the task into auth / API / backend architecture unless the prompt asks for it.

evals.prompt: 做一个产品着陆页，图和视频素材你先按页面需要规划出来，不要用 placeholder。
evals.expected_output: Skill should explicitly plan required assets, name a local asset directory strategy for the target stack, and avoid placeholder services in final output.
expectations: The output includes explicit media / asset planning.
The output names a local asset directory such as public/assets/, static/assets/, or ./assets/ depending on the stack.
The output avoids placeholder image or video service suggestions for final output.
The output treats generated or provided local assets as part of the workflow.

evals.prompt: 用 Next.js 给我做一个发布会风格的新品官网首页，重点是视觉、滚动节奏、品牌文案和本地素材组织；先别展开 hooks/状态管理那套。
evals.expected_output: Skill should keep the task in frontend-dev, treating Next.js as the implementation substrate while focusing on visual hierarchy, motion, copy, and local asset workflow rather than React-internal engineering concerns.
expectations: The output keeps the task in frontend-dev rather than reframing it as generic React engineering.
The output treats React or Next.js as an implementation vehicle, not the main complexity of the task.
The output focuses on visual hierarchy, motion, copy, and local asset workflow.
The output does not center the answer on hooks, state architecture, or React rendering internals unless directly required.

evals.prompt: 先帮我把产品官网前台做出来，登录、支付、API、后台这些后面再说；这轮只做浏览器里用户看到的部分。
evals.expected_output: Skill should keep scope explicitly inside frontend-dev, plan the browser-facing experience, and avoid prematurely expanding the work into full-stack architecture when backend scope is deferred.
expectations: The output explicitly keeps the work inside browser-facing frontend scope.
The output avoids expanding into auth, API, database, or backend service architecture.
The output still plans sections, polish, and user-visible states rather than responding with only scaffolding language.
The output makes the frontend-dev vs fullstack-dev boundary clearer because server-side work is explicitly deferred.

evals.prompt: 用 React / Next.js 帮我做一个品牌官网首屏和后面几屏，重点是高级感视觉、滚动节奏、文案和本地素材落位；hooks、状态管理先别展开。
evals.expected_output: Skill should resist being pulled into generic React-engineering mode and keep the answer centered on browser experience, design dials, motion, copy, and local asset workflow.
expectations: The output keeps the task in frontend-dev rather than reframing it as React engineering just because React or Next.js is mentioned.
The output explicitly includes design dials or equivalent visual-direction controls.
The output focuses on sections, motion, copy, and local asset placement.
The output does not center the plan on hooks, effect patterns, or client/server state architecture.

evals.prompt: 产品以后会接登录和支付，但这轮只做营销官网和浏览器里的转化体验，先别展开数据库、接口和后台设计。
evals.expected_output: Skill should explicitly keep the problem in frontend-dev, treating future backend work as out of scope for now instead of drifting into full-stack architecture planning.
expectations: The output treats backend, auth, API, and database concerns as deferred rather than current scope.
The output stays focused on browser-side conversion experience, visual hierarchy, copy, and interaction planning.
The output does not propose service boundaries, schema design, or server architecture as the main answer.
The output makes the frontend-dev vs fullstack-dev boundary explicit because server-side work is postponed.

evals.prompt: 帮我把这个新产品页做得像发布会页面：要有节奏感、镜头感、滚动叙事和清晰卖点。技术栈你默认选合适的前端方案，但别把回答写成通用工程搭架子清单。
evals.expected_output: Skill should choose a premium frontend-delivery posture, avoid generic implementation-checklist language, and anchor the answer in high-quality browser storytelling with explicit motion and accessibility handling.
expectations: The output frames the work as premium browser storytelling rather than generic project scaffolding.
The output includes section rhythm, motion planning, and persuasive copy structure.
The output explicitly mentions reduced-motion or equivalent accessibility handling for motion-heavy pages.
The output avoids collapsing into generic React or full-stack boilerplate planning.

evals.prompt: 帮我排查这个 React 页面为什么一改筛选条件就重复渲染、effect 重跑、请求打两次，顺便看看 hooks 和状态拆分是不是有问题。
evals.expected_output: Skill should yield to react rather than frontend-dev because the main complexity is React rendering behavior, hooks, and state architecture rather than browser-facing visual delivery.
expectations: The output identifies the task as React engineering rather than visual frontend implementation.
The output focuses on hooks, rendering behavior, state boundaries, or effect cleanup instead of motion/copy/asset planning.
The output makes it clear this should route to react rather than frontend-dev.

evals.prompt: 帮我搭一个带用户登录、文件上传、支付和后台管理页的产品系统，前端用 Next.js，后端你定，但一开始就按可上线结构来。
evals.expected_output: Skill should yield to fullstack-dev rather than frontend-dev because the task spans browser UI plus backend architecture, auth, upload, payment, and production structure.
expectations: The output treats the work as a full-stack application rather than a browser-only frontend task.
The output focuses on auth, uploads, payments, backend/frontend integration, or production architecture.
The output makes it clear this should route to fullstack-dev rather than frontend-dev.

evals.prompt: 把现有 Next.js 前台和 Python API 服务一起整理成更清晰的应用架构，顺便补配置管理、错误处理和实时通知链路。
evals.expected_output: Skill should yield to fullstack-dev because the current problem is system refactoring across frontend and backend boundaries rather than premium browser-surface implementation.
expectations: The output frames the task as frontend-backend architecture refactoring.
The output emphasizes integration boundaries, config, error handling, or real-time strategy rather than visual polish.
The output makes it clear this should route to fullstack-dev rather than frontend-dev.
